description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the gcc Docker image. Define two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a build job that runs a before_script to add the LLVM apt repository, import its GPG key, update apt and install make, cmake, git, wget, llvm-10-dev, then executes mkdir build, cd build, cmake .., make, and stores the build/ directory as an artifact. In the test stage add a test job that repeats the same before_script, then runs cd build, make runtests, make runmoretests, and stores the build/check/ directory as an artifact. No caches, services, or conditional rules are used.
